docs.text: HWPlugin Here will you see how to build an plugin for Hentai Web The plugin path is /hentai-web/plugins/<PLUGINNAME>/ Start Function should start like this For this needs to be in /hentai-web/plugins/<PLUGINNAME>/index.js initFile (( plugin ) => { console . log ( "Hello, world!" ); }); The plugin name should always equal to the folder name! If you want another file name, change the run in plugin.yaml to your owm - run: index.js + run: bundle.js Plugin.yaml Setup an config file in /hentai-web/plugins/<PLUGINNAME>/plugin.yaml . This is required to make the plugin run run : index.js package : author : Der_Googler version : 2.3 language : JavaScript description : |- # Fancy Event Plugin This plugin is for the [HW Project](https://github.com/DerGoogler/Hentai-Web) ### Notification Making some notifications with this plugin :D ### Open by typing <kbd>n</kbd> <kbd>o</kbd> <kbd>t</kbd> <kbd>i</kbd> on the keyboard ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54764558/151820875-c18c3478-8ed2-4fd8-8c2d-6f5b346b04b8.png) ### And enjoy the useless! ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54764558/151821078-4ef76687-a53e-4d29-9c79-a812d81d777d.png) options : allowEditor : true Note: The run is required, without will not work Markdown should applied like in the sample, with spaces etc... Add to plugin list You have to control about the plugin list Don't remove the example plugin (The app will not work anymore) - example # Don't remove this plugin! - plugin Translate your plugin initFile (( plugin ) => { const string = plugin . strings ({ de : { enableHCstring : "Aktivire Hohen Kontrast" , displayDLbutton : "Download button anzeigen" , }, en : { enableHCstring : "Enable high contrast" , displayDLbutton : "Display download button" , }, }); // get string cosole . log ( string . enableHCstring ); }); Add settings initFile (( plugin ) => { plugin . addSettings ([ { title : "My Plugin" , content : [ { key : "enableStartupDialog" , type : "switch" , text : "Dialog on app start" , }, ], }, ]); }); Functional Settings To make an startup dialog, if the setting is turned on initFile (( plugin ) => { if ( plugin . getPluginPref ( "enableStartupDialog" ) === "true" ) { alert ( "Welcome to the App" ); } }); Note: Useless if you give an Boolean or Number, it will always converted to an string Get plugin information initFile (( plugin ) => { console . log ( plugin . getAuthor ); console . log ( plugin . getVersion ); console . log ( plugin . getLanguage ); }); Platform You can allow the plugin on different platforms initFile (( plugin ) => { if ( native . isWindows /* native.isAndroid */ ) { plugin . addSettings ([ { title : "DLG" , content : [ { key : "DLG" , type : "switch" , text : "Dialog on app start" , }, ], }, ]); } else { plugin . removeSettings (); } }); Get plugin preferences Note: It returns always an string initFile (( plugin ) => { // get plugin . getPluginPref ( "enableFireworks" ); // set plugin . setPluginPref ( "enableFireworks" , "true" ); // remove plugin . removePluginPref ( "enableFireworks" ); }); Others Here are other functions that can be used initFile (( plugin ) => { // Will load from C:\hentai-web\plugins\<PLUGINNAME>\styles\index.css plugin . loadCSSfromFile ( "/styles/index.css" ); // Load CSS from an object. Lean more about JSS. plugin . loadCSS ({ "@global" : { ".card" : { border : "1px solid rgb(74 20 140)" , }, ".card-header" : { borderBottom : "1px solid rgb(74 20 140)" , backgroundColor : "rgba(74, 20, 140,.03)" , }, ".search-input--custom" : { border : "1px solid rgb(74 20 140)" , }, }, }); // Will load from C:\hentai-web\plugins\<PLUGINNAME>\core\lib.css // Nore: This code will directly executed! plugin . require ( "/core/lib.js" ); });
docs.title: HWPlugin

docs.text: Here will you see how to build an plugin for Hentai Web The plugin path is /hentai-web/plugins/<PLUGINNAME>/
docs.title: HWPlugin

docs.text: Function should start like this For this needs to be in /hentai-web/plugins/<PLUGINNAME>/index.js initFile (( plugin ) => { console . log ( "Hello, world!" ); }); The plugin name should always equal to the folder name! If you want another file name, change the run in plugin.yaml to your owm - run: index.js + run: bundle.js
docs.title: Start

docs.text: Setup an config file in /hentai-web/plugins/<PLUGINNAME>/plugin.yaml . This is required to make the plugin run run : index.js package : author : Der_Googler version : 2.3 language : JavaScript description : |- # Fancy Event Plugin This plugin is for the [HW Project](https://github.com/DerGoogler/Hentai-Web) ### Notification Making some notifications with this plugin :D ### Open by typing <kbd>n</kbd> <kbd>o</kbd> <kbd>t</kbd> <kbd>i</kbd> on the keyboard ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54764558/151820875-c18c3478-8ed2-4fd8-8c2d-6f5b346b04b8.png) ### And enjoy the useless! ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54764558/151821078-4ef76687-a53e-4d29-9c79-a812d81d777d.png) options : allowEditor : true Note: The run is required, without will not work Markdown should applied like in the sample, with spaces etc...
docs.title: Plugin.yaml

docs.text: You have to control about the plugin list Don't remove the example plugin (The app will not work anymore) - example # Don't remove this plugin! - plugin
docs.title: Add to plugin list

docs.text: initFile (( plugin ) => { const string = plugin . strings ({ de : { enableHCstring : "Aktivire Hohen Kontrast" , displayDLbutton : "Download button anzeigen" , }, en : { enableHCstring : "Enable high contrast" , displayDLbutton : "Display download button" , }, }); // get string cosole . log ( string . enableHCstring ); });
docs.title: Translate your plugin

docs.text: initFile (( plugin ) => { plugin . addSettings ([ { title : "My Plugin" , content : [ { key : "enableStartupDialog" , type : "switch" , text : "Dialog on app start" , }, ], }, ]); });
docs.title: Add settings

docs.text: To make an startup dialog, if the setting is turned on initFile (( plugin ) => { if ( plugin . getPluginPref ( "enableStartupDialog" ) === "true" ) { alert ( "Welcome to the App" ); } }); Note: Useless if you give an Boolean or Number, it will always converted to an string
docs.title: Functional Settings

docs.text: initFile (( plugin ) => { console . log ( plugin . getAuthor ); console . log ( plugin . getVersion ); console . log ( plugin . getLanguage ); });
docs.title: Get plugin information

docs.text: You can allow the plugin on different platforms initFile (( plugin ) => { if ( native . isWindows /* native.isAndroid */ ) { plugin . addSettings ([ { title : "DLG" , content : [ { key : "DLG" , type : "switch" , text : "Dialog on app start" , }, ], }, ]); } else { plugin . removeSettings (); } });
docs.title: Platform

docs.text: Note: It returns always an string initFile (( plugin ) => { // get plugin . getPluginPref ( "enableFireworks" ); // set plugin . setPluginPref ( "enableFireworks" , "true" ); // remove plugin . removePluginPref ( "enableFireworks" ); });
docs.title: Get plugin preferences

docs.text: Here are other functions that can be used initFile (( plugin ) => { // Will load from C:\hentai-web\plugins\<PLUGINNAME>\styles\index.css plugin . loadCSSfromFile ( "/styles/index.css" ); // Load CSS from an object. Lean more about JSS. plugin . loadCSS ({ "@global" : { ".card" : { border : "1px solid rgb(74 20 140)" , }, ".card-header" : { borderBottom : "1px solid rgb(74 20 140)" , backgroundColor : "rgba(74, 20, 140,.03)" , }, ".search-input--custom" : { border : "1px solid rgb(74 20 140)" , }, }, }); // Will load from C:\hentai-web\plugins\<PLUGINNAME>\core\lib.css // Nore: This code will directly executed! plugin . require ( "/core/lib.js" ); });

docs.text:
Create Activity How to create an Activity? class ChangelogActivity extends BaseActivity { public constructor(props: any) { super(props) } public componentDidMount = () => { super.componentDidMount; console.log(this.props.changelog.package.android); } private renderToolbar = () => { return ( ); }; public render = () => { return (
{this.props.changelog.changes}
); }; } export default ChangelogActivity;
docs.title: Create Activity

How to create an Activity? class ChangelogActivity extends BaseActivity { public constructor(props: any) { super(props) } public componentDidMount = () => { super.componentDidMount; console.log(this.props.changelog.package.android); } private renderToolbar = () => { return ( ); }; public render = () => { return (
{this.props.changelog.changes}
); }; } export default ChangelogActivity;

docs.text: IPC (Beta) On ipc . on ( "myEvent" , ( data ) => console . log ( data . message ); ); Send ipc . send ( "myEvent" , { message : "Pong" }); Destroy ipc . destroy ( "myEvent" );
